title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 329.123 - Duplicate license issued, when
text:
329.123.  Duplicate license issued, when. — A duplicate license shall be issued without the payment of a duplicate license fee if an affidavit is presented showing that the license has been destroyed, lost, mutilated beyond practical usage, or was never received.
(L. 1959 S.B. 283 § 329.131, A.L. 1979 H.B. 960, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 1989 H.B. 738 & 720)
